name: ccc-operations
description: CCC internal operations toolkit. Three skills: CCC SOP Creator (HEROIC-format SOPs for any repeatable business process — GTM channels, delivery, internal workflows), Skill Creator Pro (full engineering loop for Claude skills and plugins — draft, test, evaluate, iterate), and Marketplace Health Check (compliance scan across all marketplace plugins and skills with scored report and fix list). Use these skills to build, improve, and maintain CCC's own systems.
